title: Dhammapada, Chapter 26: The Brahmin
description: Chapter 26 of the Dhammapada — the Buddha's collected verses on wisdom and the path.
introduction: Chapter 26 of the Dhammapada — the Buddha's collected verses on wisdom and the path.

text: A person is not a Brahmin by birth, nor by birth a non-Brahmin. By deeds alone one becomes a Brahmin, by deeds alone a non-Brahmin.
